name: io.github.kansei-link/kansei-mcp-server
description: MCP intelligence layer for discovering and orchestrating Japanese SaaS MCP tools. AEO (Agent Engine Optimization) for the Agent Economy.

tools.name: search_services
tools.description: Intent-based search for Japanese SaaS MCP services with category-aware ranking

tools.name: get_recipe
tools.description: Get structured workflow recipes combining multiple MCP services

tools.name: find_combinations
tools.description: Reverse recipe lookup — find what other MCPs can be combined with a given service

tools.name: check_updates
tools.description: Check recent changes and changelog for an MCP service

tools.name: report_outcome
tools.description: Report agent experience using an MCP service (anonymized, PII-masked)

tools.name: get_insights
tools.description: Read aggregated agent experience data and confidence scores for a service
